cases.name: associative-partial
cases.compatibility_note: Nested associative maps merge while preserving sibling defaults.

cases.name: complete-list
cases.compatibility_note: Complete palette and font lists retain wholesale replacement semantics.

cases.name: incomplete-list
cases.compatibility_note: Incomplete replacement arrays are reported and their safe defaults remain intact.

cases.name: malformed
cases.compatibility_note: Malformed input preserves the existing logged-default behavior.

cases.name: missing
cases.compatibility_note: A missing file continues to leave defaults unchanged.
